title: Palladium
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Palladium''' was a rare and valuable substance. It was believed to be the basis of a creature's gizzard that produced [[cold fusion]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka]]''

*<!-- 1989-XX-XX -->''[[Galaxy Guide 4: Alien Races]]''
